title: lithocarpus llanosii
intro: Lithocarpus llanosii, also known as the Llanos oak, is a species of plant in the beech family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus llanosii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus llanosii can be prepared as a tea or decoction, which is typically made by steeping the leaves and twigs in hot water.
